name: twitter-tools
description: Fetch normalized X/Twitter content, download referenced media, and monitor configured X/Twitter users for downstream agent workflows.

interface.longDescription: Twitter Tools provides X/Twitter data, media, and monitor skills for upper-layer archive, translation, and knowledge-ingestion workflows. twitter-fetch emits JSON or JSONL; twitter-media-fetch downloads referenced media and emits a manifest; twitter-monitor orchestrates configured user monitoring and delegates Obsidian writes to content-to-obsidian.
interface.defaultPrompt: Fetch or monitor this X/Twitter content and return normalized output.
